title: Infosys and Handelsblatt Launch AI-Powered Editorial Link Intelligence Engine
detailed_summary: Infosys and Handelsblatt Media Group announced the launch of Editorial Link Intelligence, an AI-powered editorial recommendation engine developed exclusively for Handelsblatt and WirtschaftsWoche. The solution leverages Infosys Aster and was developed by Wongdoody, Infosys' human experience agency. It analyses article content and metadata to recommend internal links, aiming to streamline editorial workflows, improve reader navigation, increase time spent on site, and support deeper reader engagement. The launch is described as a key milestone in Infosys' three-year collaboration with Handelsblatt as its official AI & Digital Innovation Partner.
